name: chip8_octo
license_evidence: Octo: JohnEarnest/Octo GitHub /license endpoint -> LICENSE.txt, spdx_id=MIT (bundled as octo/LICENSE.txt). chip8Archive: Readme.md explicit dedication -- 'everything in this repository is placed under the Creative Commons 0 (CC0) No Rights Reserved license' (bundled as roms/ARCHIVE_README.md). All 101 ROMs are covered by that repo-wide CC0 dedication.
runtime: JavaScript. Octo is a self-contained browser CHIP-8/SCHIP/XO-CHIP IDE+emulator (js/ + lib/codemirror + css). Open octo/index.html, paste/load a ROM (or one of the 101 archived .ch8 files) and run. No build step, no server needed.
notes: A CHIP-8 console + a 101-game CC0 library on a cassette. Octo runtime trimmed to runnable essentials (index/standalone html + js + css + lib/codemirror + UI images), doc screenshots/gifs dropped (1.0MB -> 68KB images). 101 CC0 ROMs + programs.json/authors.json metadata. Tape size 0.630 MB (on the 0.6 MB target). Sanity: xz integrity OK; 101 .ch8 ROMs present after roundtrip; ROM sizes 56 B - 65 KB (the 65KB one is an XO-CHIP extended program, valid).
